name: Blues
description: Blues — Cellular IoT connectivity for embedded devices with satellite fallback and secure cloud data routing via Notehub.

seo.title: Blues — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Blues: Blues — Cellular IoT connectivity for embedded devices with satellite fallback and secure cloud data routing via Notehub.

when_to_use: Cellular IoT connectivity with satellite fallback for remote devices
Routing embedded device data securely to the cloud via Notehub
Low-power LPWAN data transmission for field monitoring sensors
Offline-tolerant IoT data buffering with automatic cloud sync
Connecting remote industrial assets with no WiFi dependency

pros: Prepaid global cellular with one SKU
Satellite fallback in the same Notecard
cons: Higher per-device cost than raw SIMs
Ecosystem smaller than Particle or Hologram
review.verdict: A developer-friendly cellular IoT stack, priced for premium rather than mass-market fleets.
review.best_for: Product teams shipping connected devices without carrier negotiations
review.not_for: High-volume deployments where per-device cellular cost is critical
